message: Match GitHub Actions keychain setup for pkg signing

files.patch:
@@ -37,18 +37,20 @@ jobs:
           KEYCHAIN_PATH="$RUNNER_TEMP/build.keychain-db"
           APP_CERT_PATH="$RUNNER_TEMP/developer-id-application.p12"
           INSTALLER_CERT_PATH="$RUNNER_TEMP/developer-id-installer.p12"
+          EXISTING_USER_KEYCHAINS=$(security list-keychains -d user | tr -d '"')
 
           echo "$DEVELOPER_ID_APPLICATION_CERT_BASE64" | base64 --decode > "$APP_CERT_PATH"
           echo "$DEVELOPER_ID_INSTALLER_CERT_BASE64" | base64 --decode > "$INSTALLER_CERT_PATH"
 
           security create-keychain -p "$RUNNER_TEMP" "$KEYCHAIN_PATH"
-          security list-keychains -d user -s "$KEYCHAIN_PATH"
+          security list-keychains -d user -s "$KEYCHAIN_PATH" $EXISTING_USER_KEYCHAINS
           security default-keychain -d user -s "$KEYCHAIN_PATH"
           security unlock-keychain -p "$RUNNER_TEMP" "$KEYCHAIN_PATH"
           security set-keychain-settings -lut 21600 "$KEYCHAIN_PATH"
-          security import "$APP_CERT_PATH" -k "$KEYCHAIN_PATH" -P "$DEVELOPER_ID_APPLICATION_CERT_PASSWORD" -T /usr/bin/codesign -T /usr/bin/security
-          security import "$INSTALLER_CERT_PATH" -k "$KEYCHAIN_PATH" -P "$DEVELOPER_ID_INSTALLER_CERT_PASSWORD" -T /usr/bin/pkgbuild -T /usr/bin/productbuild -T /usr/bin/productsign -T /usr/bin/security
-          security set-key-partition-list -S apple-tool:,apple: -s -k "$RUNNER_TEMP" "$KEYCHAIN_PATH"
+          security import "$APP_CERT_PATH" -k "$KEYCHAIN_PATH" -P "$DEVELOPER_ID_APPLICATION_CERT_PASSWORD" -A -T /usr/bin/codesign -T /usr/bin/security
+          security import "$INSTALLER_CERT_PATH" -k "$KEYCHAIN_PATH" -P "$DEVELOPER_ID_INSTALLER_CERT_PASSWORD" -A -T /usr/bin/pkgbuild -T /usr/bin/productbuild -T /usr/bin/productsign -T /usr/bin/security
+          security set-key-partition-list -S apple-tool:,apple: -s -k "$RUNNER_TEMP" -D "${{ secrets.DEVELOPER_ID_APPLICATION_SIGNING_IDENTITY }}" -t private "$KEYCHAIN_PATH"
+          security set-key-partition-list -S apple-tool:,apple: -s -k "$RUNNER_TEMP" -D "${{ secrets.DEVELOPER_ID_INSTALLER_SIGNING_IDENTITY }}" -t private "$KEYCHAIN_PATH"
           echo "SIGNING_KEYCHAIN_PATH=$KEYCHAIN_PATH" >> "$GITHUB_ENV"
 
       - name: Build Release App
